mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate triggers a decrease in labor demand, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in pre-recessionary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the housing market triggers a decrease in demand for goods and services, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST falls below 800k units in 3 months
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in housing market downturns are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in industrial production triggers an expansion of supply, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansionary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the federal funds rate triggers a decrease in discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the GDP triggers a decrease in demand for goods and services, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in recessionary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the labor market triggers an increase in labor demand, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansionary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A decline in the consumer price index triggers a decrease in demand for goods and services, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains above 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in inflationary periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: An increase in industrial production triggers an expansion of supply, which compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansionary periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
